title: Taglory Rope Dog Lead with Soft Padded Handle, 1.5 m Reflective Lead and Multi-Colour for Medium Large Dogs, 1.2 cm, Black
features: More Durable, Much Safer: This heavy duty dog lead is made of 1.2 cm diameter rock climbing rope which is reinforced with durable woven design. Sturdy enough for medium large dogs

Comfortable to Hold: Special foam padded handle design gives you a more comfortable grip than ever, protecting your hands from rope burn even your dog pulls. O-ring on the handle allows you to easily attach a waste bag or keys. Enjoy each moment with your dog

Reflective Function: When walking your dog at night, visibility is key to the safety of you and your dog. Reflective threads along the entire length of the lead provides added safety at night. Available in 12 distinct radiant colour s to pick from, pick what suits you and your dog
360°Swivel Clasp: The Nickel-plated zinc alloy clip swivels to resist twisting. Say "no" to the rope twining during outdoor walking, hiking, playing with your dog

Enjoy Time Out with Your Dog: Available in two diameters: 1.0 cm, 1.2 cm; the diameter of 1.0 cm is made for small to medium dogs, will not too bulky or heavy; if you have medium or normal large dogs, the diameter of 1.2 cm would be your best choice
